---
title: " "
pagetitle: "Burak Sonmez"
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">


## Postgraduate courses

Spring 2019: Introduction to Quantitative Analysis, London School of Economics & Political Science (LSE), **Seminar teacher**.

Fall 2018: Introduction to Quantitative Analysis for Media & Communications, London School of Economics & Political Science (LSE), **Seminar teacher**.

Summer 2018: Longitudinal Data Anaylsis, Essex Summer School in Social Science Data Analysis, **Teaching assistant**.


## Undergraduate courses

Spring 2020: Models and Measurement in Quantitative Sociology, University of Essex, **Lecturer**.

Fall 2019: Researching Social Life II, University of Essex, **Graduate teaching assistant**.

Spring 2019: Ethics and Public Policy, University of Essex, **Graduate teaching assistant**.

Fall 2016-Spring 2018: Researching Social Life I, University of Essex, **Graduate teaching. assistant**.

Spring 2011-2012: Economic Theory for Engineers, Bilkent University, **Teaching assistant**.

Fall 2010-2011: Mathematics for Economists, Bilkent University, **Teaching assistant**.

## Workshops

Feb 2019: Online Data Collection through Crowdsourcing Marketplaces, University of Essex, **Lecturer**.

Jun 2018: Online Data Collection through Crowdsourcing Marketplaces, European University Institute (EUI), **Guest lecturer**.
